steps.title: Set up the linear inequality
steps.content:
Let $x$ = additional samples needed. The total samples collected will be current samples plus additional samples. Since the geologist needs at least 74 samples:
$$69 + x \geq 74$$

steps.title: Solve for the minimum additional samples
steps.content:
Subtract 69 from both sides:
$$x \geq 5$$
The minimum number of additional samples is 5. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
